children.text: disburse appropriations authorized to accomplish the purposes of ; andsection 2212 of this title
collect all revenues received from the lease, permit, or sale of resources from interests acquired under or paid by Indian landowners under .section 2212 of this titlesection 2212 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: be deposited in the Acquisition Fund;

children.label: B
children.text: as specified in advance in appropriations Acts, be available for the purpose of acquiring additional fractional interests in trust or restricted lands; and

children.label: C
children.text: be used to acquire undivided interests on the reservation from which the income was derived.

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: 2 Use of funds
children.text: The Secretary may use the revenue deposited in the Acquisition Fund under paragraph (1) to acquire some or all of the undivided interests in any parcels of land in accordance with .section 2204 of this title
